backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Nellore Print Hub backend, defining all data types (quotations, projects, reviews, users, etc.) and mixing in blob storage and authorization modules.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, used as a build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Nellore Print Hub' and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all public, customer, and admin routes, wrapping each admin route in a named AdminGuard component to satisfy React hooks rules.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that checks session validity and admin existence, redirecting unauthenticated users to the admin login or registration page while showing a loading spinner.
frontend/src/components/BilingualText.ts: Presentational component that renders English and Telugu text together, either stacked vertically or inline side-by-side with a separator.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Mobile-only fixed bottom navigation bar with six icon tabs (Home, Services, Gallery, Testimonials, Contact, Chat) that highlights the active route.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheet.tsx: Modal bottom sheet component with backdrop, slide-up animation, optional title/close button, and scroll lock on the body while open.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheetSelec: Form select component that opens a BottomSheet with a list of options, showing a checkmark on the selected item and triggering haptic feedback on selection.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: A floating chat widget component that allows authenticated users to send and view messages, with form validation, haptic feedback, and auto-scroll to the latest message.
frontend/src/components/CustomerGuard.ts: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated customers to the login page, rendering children only when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggle.t: A toggle button component that switches the app language between English and Telugu using the LanguageContext.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component providing a sticky header with navigation, footer with contact info, scroll-to-top button, and bottom navigation for mobile.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing loading state and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/NegotiationHisto: Displays a scrollable chat-style history of negotiation messages between a customer and admin for a given order.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog for first-time users to set up their profile by entering name, email, and mobile number, with validation and backend save.
frontend/src/components/ProjectDetailMod: A modal dialog that displays detailed information about a gallery project, including its image, category badge, description, and completion date.
frontend/src/components/PullToRefreshCon: A container component that adds pull-to-refresh functionality on touch devices, showing a spinner indicator during the refresh action.
frontend/src/components/ShareAppButton.t: A button component that triggers the native Web Share API or falls back to clipboard copy to share the app URL.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: Renders animated skeleton loading placeholders in four variants: project, review, quotation, and a default service card.
frontend/src/components/SwipeContainer.t: Wraps children in a div that listens for touch events and applies a horizontal translateX transform to provide swipe navigation feedback.
frontend/src/contexts/CustomerAuthContex: Provides a React context for customer session management, persisting login state (customerId and identifier) to localStorage.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for language selection (English/Telugu), persisting the choice to localStorage and exposing a translation lookup function.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Queries the backend to determine whether the currently authenticated Internet Identity caller has admin privileges.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Exposes a mutation that SHA-256 hashes a password and calls the backend's verifyAuthentication to log in an admin user.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminContent.ts: Provides hooks to fetch and update the full AdminContent record (contact info, services, gallery, etc.) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminExists.ts: Queries the backend admin user count to determine whether any admin account has been registered yet.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminInvitations.t: Provides hooks to list existing admin invitations and invite a new admin user with a SHA-256-hashed password.
Exposes mutations for registering the first admin and inviting additional admins, both hashing passwords with SHA-256 before calling the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useAppName.ts: Provides hooks to get and set the application name stored in the backend, with a 5-minute stale time.
frontend/src/hooks/useBiometricAuth.ts: Provides mutations for WebAuthn-based biometric login and registration, delegating credential creation to utility helpers and registering results with the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useChat.ts: Provides hooks for sending customer messages, fetching all chat messages, posting owner replies, and retrieving per-customer chat history.
frontend/src/hooks/useCompanyLogo.ts: Provides hooks to fetch and update the company logo stored as an ExternalBlob in the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactInfo.ts: Provides hooks to fetch and update contact information (email, phone, address, maps link) from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerQuotations: Fetches the list of quotation requests associated with a given customer ID from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useDelivery.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching delivery config, calculating delivery fees, and updating delivery config via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state to React components.
frontend/src/hooks/useNegotiation.ts: Provides a mutation hook for responding to quotation negotiations, invalidating related quotation queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfficeLocation.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and updating the office location via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjects.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all projects or by category, and mutations for adding, editing, and deleting projects.
frontend/src/hooks/usePullToRefresh.ts: Implements a pull-to-refresh gesture hook using touch events, tracking pull distance and triggering a refresh callback when a threshold is exceeded.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationFile.ts: Provides a query hook to fetch the reply file blob associated with a given quotation ID from the backend actor.
Provides a mutation hook for handling quotation responses (status updates with optional messages), invalidating quotation queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotations.ts: Provides a comprehensive set of React Query hooks for creating, fetching, and managing quotation requests and their details, including approval and status transitions.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationStatistic: Provides a polling query hook that fetches quotation counts grouped by status from the backend actor, refreshing every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useReviews.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all reviews or by rating, and a mutation hook for adding new reviews via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useServiceImages.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and deleting service images via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeNavigation.ts: Implements horizontal swipe gesture navigation between a predefined set of routes using TanStack Router, tracking swipe offset and triggering navigation on threshold.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching the current caller's user profile and saving/updating it via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoClips.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and deleting video clips via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a deep teal & gold CSS custom property theme for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: Wraps the backend ExternalBlob class to provide typed helpers for creating blobs from URLs or bytes, retrieving bytes/URLs, and tracking upload progress.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders a static About page with a hero banner, a grid of four benefit cards, and a commitment section, all using i18n translations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AboutContentMan: Admin page for editing and saving the About page custom text content, protected by AdminGuard, using useGetAdminContent and useUpdateAdminContent hooks.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Main admin dashboard displaying quotation statistics and navigation cards linking to all admin management sections such as quotations, projects, reviews, chat, users, and settings.
Admin login page with email/password form that authenticates via useAdminAuth, sets a session on success, and redirects to registration if no admin account exists yet.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminRegistrati: Initial admin registration page that requires Internet Identity authentication before creating an admin account with email and password, redirecting to login if an admin already exists.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminUserManage: Admin page for managing admin users, displaying a table of existing admins and providing a dialog form to invite new admin users with email and password credentials.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AppNameManageme: Admin page that allows administrators to view and update the application name, with validation for empty input and a 100-character limit.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BusinessHoursMa: Admin page for managing weekly business hours, allowing admins to set open/close times or mark each day as closed, then save changes to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ChatManagementP: Admin page that displays all customer chat messages grouped by email, allowing admins to expand conversations and send replies to individual messages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ContactInfoMana: Admin page for editing and saving contact information fields (email, phone, physical address, maps link) to the admin content store.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DeliveryConfigM: Admin page for configuring delivery pricing, allowing admins to set per-km rate and minimum fee (stored in paise, displayed in rupees) with save confirmation and error feedback.
frontend/src/pages/admin/HomepageContent: Admin page for editing and saving the homepage promotional/announcement text, displayed as a banner on the homepage.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LogoManagementP: Admin page for uploading and replacing the company logo, with file validation, upload progress tracking, and a preview of the current logo.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectManageme: Admin page for managing portfolio projects, supporting add, edit, and delete operations with image upload, title, description, and service category fields.
frontend/src/pages/admin/QuotationManage: Admin page for viewing and managing all customer quotations, with expandable detail cards, status badges, and actions to mark customer-pending or accept payment.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ServiceMediaMan: Admin page for managing service-related media, with tabbed sections to add or delete service images and video clips by service type.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUsPage.tsx: Displays contact information (phone, email, address) and a contact form that submits messages via the backend actor, with loading and success states.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerLogi: Customer login page that authenticates users via email or mobile number with SHA-256 hashed password, then redirects to the customer portal on success.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerPort: Customer portal dashboard that displays the authenticated customer's quotations with status badges and order progress indicators, and provides a logout option.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerRegi: Customer registration page that collects email, mobile, and password, hashes the password with SHA-256, calls the backend registerCustomer method, and redirects to login on success.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryInfoPage.tsx: Shows delivery pricing configuration and an interactive fee calculator that calls the backend to estimate delivery cost based on entered distance.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section, service cards, print sample gallery, and feature highlights for the Nellore Print Hub application.
frontend/src/pages/MyQuotationsPage.tsx: Displays a customer's quotation list with status badges, pricing details, and approve/reject actions. Uses hooks for fetching quotations and approving them, with bilingual (Telugu/English) support.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectGalleryPage.ts: Shows a filterable masonry-grid gallery of completed projects categorized by service type. Supports a detail modal and displays loading skeletons while fetching data.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationConfirmation: Confirmation screen shown after a quotation is submitted, displaying the quotation ID and a numbered list of next steps. Provides navigation buttons to view quotations or return home.
Form page for customers to submit a new print/design quotation request, collecting service type, deadline, project details, contact info, and design status. Validates inputs and navigates to the confirmation page on success.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationResponsePage: Customer-facing page listing quotations with actions to accept, reject, negotiate, or approve pricing. Fetches quotation details per card and shows negotiation history via a dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Static services overview page listing six print/design service categories (design, digital, outdoor, indoor, screen, offset) with descriptions, item lists, and styled badges. Includes a page header and navigation to request a quotation.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitReviewPage.tsx: A form page that allows authenticated users to submit a review with name, star rating, project type, review text, and an optional image upload, then posts it via the useAddReview hook.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Displays a filterable grid of customer reviews fetched from the backend, requiring authentication to view, with pull-to-refresh support and a button to navigate to the submit-review page.
frontend/src/translations/en.ts: English translation strings for the entire application, covering navigation, services, quotation forms, statuses, customer portal, and more.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Exports English and Telugu translation objects and provides a getTranslations helper that returns the correct record based on the selected language.
frontend/src/translations/te.ts: Telugu translation strings mirroring the English translation file, providing localized text for all application UI keys.
frontend/src/utils/haptics.ts: Utility module wrapping the browser Vibration API to provide tap, success, error, and selection haptic feedback patterns.
frontend/src/utils/sessionStorage.ts: Admin session management utility that stores, retrieves, and clears admin authentication state in sessionStorage with support for multiple key formats for backward compatibility.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/webauthn.ts: Provides WebAuthn helper functions for checking platform authenticator support, registering credentials, authenticating users, and converting between ArrayBuffer and Base64.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom CSS-variable-based colors (teal, gold, ink, paper), brand fonts, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata and feature requests for Nellore Print Hub, currently flagging a pending fix for a chicken-and-egg admin registration authorization bug.
